## Checklist

- [ ] Added/updated tests (validation rules live in `packages/core` with fixture-backed tests)

- [ ] `pnpm typecheck` passes
- [ ] `pnpm test` passes
- [ ] Added a changeset (`pnpm changeset`) if this affects a published package
